creator: christos@freebsd.org
text:
Hello tt,

I know this is an old thread, but can you provide the output of the following:

- hw.snd
- dev.pcm
- /dev/sndstat with hw.snd.verbose=2
- a copy of your dmesg

I am afraid Gavin's proposed solution doesn't work since your /dev/sndstat reports only one device to exist in your system.
